allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Killed $_" } catch { "skip $_" } }; Remove-Item -Path ".next-dev.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "done")

PowerShell(@\(18940, 3000, 3001\) | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Killed $_" } catch { "skip $_" } }; "done")
